cast.name: 斯坦娜·卡蒂克 Stana Katic

writer.name: 本杰明·安德森 Benjamin Anderson

this_title: Kidnapped in Her Own Home: The Martha Carelli Story
introduction: Based on Ann Rule’s non-fiction story, The Painter’s Wife.Martha Carelli’s (Katic) quiet life is shattered when an escaped convict hiding in her basement takes her hostage. Forced to drive his getaway car, Martha finds herself trapped in a dangerous psychological battle where survival depends on both courage and cunning.  As the miles pass, Martha carefully leaves behind subtle clues she hopes will guide authorities to her location. With her captor growing increasingly volatile and another hostage’s life at stake, Martha must rely on her instincts, resilience, and resourcefulness to outwit her abductor and make it home alive.
chinese_title: Kidnapped in Her Own Home: The Martha Carelli Story
